languages.text: Getting an Injury also applies Stunned.

languages.text: When the user suffers an {g|Encyclopedia:Injury}injury{/g}, they also become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
